full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What is the main baseline in shapelets paper Sec 1 and 5, and its limitation vs. shapelets
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed 1-NN full-series as baseline, limitation: ignores local motifs
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified with Sec 1 (motivation) and Sec 5.2–5.5 results (91% vs 93%)
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Rewrote the explanation of the baseline in my own words and expanded it to explain why 1-NN on full series fails to capture local discriminative patterns. Added references to Sections 1 and 5.2–5.5 after verifying the comparison results in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Suggest a scenario where shapelets would not outperform 1-NN based on Sec 6 limitations
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Inferred from Sec 6 (univariate, no warping) and Sec 5.1 Lightning; rewrote as multi-modal series
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Extended the suggested scenario by formulating a concrete example of time-warped and multi-modal time series. Rewrote the explanation to connect the limitation to the discussion in Section 6 and clarified why shapelets may fail when patterns are non-contiguous or heavily warped.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What is the main baseline in shapelets paper Sec 1 and 5, and its limitation vs. shapelets
top_5_prompts.why_important: Pinned down 1-NN as explicit baseline with limitation (black-box globals), for 2-mark ID

top_5_prompts.prompt: Suggest a scenario where shapelets would not outperform 1-NN based on Sec 6 limitations
